title: National Fiddling Day Act
description: National Fiddling Day Act (National Fiddling Day Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Fiddling Day Act .

provisions.title: National Fiddling Day
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the third Saturday in May is to be known as “National Fiddling Day”.

provisions.title: Not a legal holiday
provisions.content: 3 For greater certainty, National Fiddling Day is not a legal holiday or a non-juridical day.
